{"credits": [{"type": "remediation_developer", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/1392869?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/daftspunk/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/daftspunk/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/daftspunk/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/daftspunk/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/daftspunk", "id": 1392869, "login": "daftspunk", "node_id": "MDQ6VXNlcjEzOTI4Njk=", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/daftspunk/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/daftspunk/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/daftspunk/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/daftspunk/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/daftspunk/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/daftspunk", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-27937", "cvss": {"score": 3.1, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:H/PR:N/UI:R/S:U/C:N/I:L/A:N"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 3.1, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:H/PR:N/UI:R/S:U/C:N/I:L/A:N"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-79", "name": "Improper Neutralization of Input During Web Page Generation ('Cross-site Scripting')"}], "description": "A reflected Cross-Site Scripting (XSS) vulnerability was identified in the backend DataTable widget where a query parameter was rendered without proper output escaping.

### Impact
- Reflected XSS only, no stored/persistent component
- The backend URL prefix is customizable and must be known or guessed by the attacker
- Requires an authenticated backend user to visit a crafted URL
- No direct access is gained without social engineering

### Patches
The vulnerability has been patched in v3.7.16 and v4.1.16. The affected parameter is now properly escaped. All users are encouraged to upgrade to the latest patched version.

### Workarounds
- Use a non-default backend URL prefix (recommended as standard practice)
- Implement a Content Security Policy (CSP) for backend pages", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00144, "percentile": 0.03974}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-jj38-h5w5-mvpf", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-04-21T17:15:21Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-jj38-h5w5-mvpf", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-jj38-h5w5-mvpf"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-27937"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-04-21T17:16:35Z", "published_at": "2026-04-21T17:15:21Z", "references": ["https://github.com/octobercms/october/security/advisories/GHSA-jj38-h5w5-mvpf", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-27937", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-jj38-h5w5-mvpf"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/octobercms/october/security-advisories/GHSA-jj38-h5w5-mvpf", "severity": "low", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/octobercms/october", "summary": "October CMS: Reflected XSS via DataTable Form Widget", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-04-24T21:06:34Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-jj38-h5w5-mvpf", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "3.7.16", "package": {"ecosystem": "composer", "name": "october/system"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 3.7.16"}, {"first_patched_version": null, "package": {"ecosystem": "composer", "name": "october/system"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 4.0.0, < 4.1.16"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: October CMS: Reflected XSS via DataTable Form Widget
